ll ans[]={0,3,6,10,15,21,28,36,45,55,3,9,18,30,45,63,84,108,135,165,6,18,36,60,90,126,168,216,270,330,10,30,60,100,150,210,280,360,450,550,15,45,90,150,225,315,420,540,675,825,21,63,126,210,315,441,588,756,945,1155,28,84,168,280,420,588,784,1008,1260,1540,36,108,216,360,540,756,1008,1296,1620,1980,45,135,270,450,675,945,1260,1620,2025,2475,55,165,330,550,825,1155,1540,1980,2475,3025,3,9,18,30,45,63,84,108,135,165,9,27,54,90,135,189,252,324,405,495,18,54,108,180,270,378,504,648,810,990,30,90,180,300,450,630,840,1080,1350,1650,45,135,270,450,675,945,1260,1620,2025,2475,63,189,378,630,945,1323,1764,2268,2835,3465,84,252,504,840,1260,1764,2352,3024,3780,4620,108,324,648,1080,1620,2268,3024,3888,4860,5940,135,405,810,1350,2025,2835,3780,4860,6075,7425,165,495,990,1650,2475,3465,4620,5940,7425,9075,6,18,36,60,90,126,168,216,270,330,18,54,108,180,270,378,504,648,810,990,36,108,216,360,540,756,1008,1296,1620,1980,60,180,360,600,900,1260,1680,2160,2700,3300,90,270,540,900,1350,1890,2520,3240,4050,4950,126,378,756,1260,1890,2646,3528,4536,5670,6930,168,504,1008,1680,2520,3528,4704,6048,7560,9240,216,648,1296,2160,3240,4536,6048,7776,9720,11880,270,810,1620,2700,4050,5670,7560,9720,12150,14850,330,990,1980,3300,4950,6930,9240,11880,14850,18150,10,30,60,100,150,210,280,360,450,550,30,90,180,300,450,630,840,1080,1350,1650,60,180,360,600,900,1260,1680,2160,2700,3300,100,300,600,1000,1500,2100,2800,3600,4500,5500,150,450,900,1500,2250,3150,4200,5400,6750,8250,210,630,1260,2100,3150,4410,5880,7560,9450,11550,280,840,1680,2800,4200,5880,7840,10080,12600,15400,360,1080,2160,3600,5400,7560,10080,12960,16200,19800,450,1350,2700,4500,6750,9450,12600,16200,20250,24750,550,1650,3300,5500,8250,11550,15400,19800,24750,30250,15,45,90,150,225,315,420,540,675,825,45,135,270,450,675,945,1260,1620,2025,2475,90,270,540,900,1350,1890,2520,3240,4050,4950,150,450,900,1500,2250,3150,4200,5400,6750,8250,225,675,1350,2250,3375,4725,6300,8100,10125,12375,315,945,1890,3150,4725,6615,8820,11340,14175,17325,4
